reviews.review_msg: Incredibly hard to understand and very unhelpful. Every one of her examples in class are nearly straight out of the textbook and her lessons are the same as the textbook just with less detail and way less clear language. Ontop of this she holds random pop quizez to ensure that you attend class and sit through her unless lectures. Not recommended.

Eldar was a great prof! Definitely would love to take another class with him. Doesn't use the textbook or even blackboard so you must go to class but then all the exams are based solely on his notes which is nice. Fast at emailing you back if you have any  questions and his lectures are interesting because he engages with the class a lot.

I took Principles of Microeconomics and Principles of Macroeconomics in 2018W. That was an excellent experience. Dr. Hasan integrated a lot of interesting real-life cases with knowledge points. I applied what I learned during my internship in investment banking, connecting different economic information to give in-depth analysis and recommendations

Dr. Hasan is enthusiastic and caring. While he goes off on tangents or tells irrelevant stories at times, they're generally funny and add to the class atmosphere. Participation matters as there are iclickers. He genuinely cares about students, respects mental-health, and makes up for lost lectures by doing them online.

Posts his notes online, but attending he may give some hints and tips that might be useful, good joker and enjoyable lecutre, some homework but manageable, great guy.... says clear a lot so if you cant stand people repeating words then maybe dont attend the lecture i guess
He's a very chilled and funny guy but hard to understand him so READ THE TEXTBOOK. He's one of the few professors who truly want you to achieve by giving you several chances to bring your mark up!

He's a good teacher. But he only accepts his way of thinking. If you're really into critical thinking, you should NOT pick his course, because you will only do well in this class if you entirely accept his ideas without questioning anything.
Jane Friesen does not understand anything about economics but thinks she does.
Very enjoyable class. Pay attention, write notes and participate and you'll really enjoy this class. Great prof.
nice teacher ,but the exam was too hard and holy chicky
